project.name: qelectrotech
project.description: QElectroTech (QET) is a free and open source CAD/CAE desktop application for creating IEC 60617 wiring diagrams, terminal strips, and multi-folio electrical schematics.

nodes.name: elementscollectionwidget.h
nodes.summary: Declares the ElementsCollectionWidget class, a QWidget-based panel that renders the common, custom, and project-embedded element collections in a tree view with search, context menus, and project management slots.

nodes.name: ElementsCollectionWidget
nodes.summary: Tree-view widget for browsing, searching, and managing the QET element library (common, custom, and per-project embedded collections), used as a dockable panel in the main diagram editor.

nodes.name: nameslist.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements the NamesList value type, a language-keyed map of display names with XML serialization via both QDomElement and pugixml, used by elements and categories to carry translated labels.

nodes.name: nameslist.h
nodes.summary: Declares the NamesList class, a QMap-backed container that holds element and category display names in multiple languages and provides both DOM and pugixml round-trip serialization.

nodes.name: NamesList
nodes.summary: Language-keyed string map with XML round-trip support, declared as a Qt metatype so it can be passed through signals and stored in QVariant.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses Q_DECLARE_METATYPE to make NamesList usable in Qt property/signal systems.

nodes.name: fromXml
nodes.summary: Overloaded XML deserialization method supporting both QDomElement and pugixml node inputs, populating the internal language-to-name map from XML elements.

nodes.name: toXml
nodes.summary: Serializes the names map to a QDomElement subtree, iterating all language entries and creating child elements with lang attributes.

nodes.name: name
nodes.summary: Returns the best-matching display name for the current application locale, falling back to the first available language if the preferred locale is absent.

nodes.name: qwidgetanimation.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements QWidgetAnimation, which uses QPropertyAnimation to animate the show and hide transitions of a QWidget by animating its maximumSize property across three layout-aware behavior modes.

nodes.name: qwidgetanimation.h
nodes.summary: Declares QWidgetAnimation, a QPropertyAnimation subclass that smoothly shows and hides QWidgets in three configurable size-determination modes (minimumSizeHint, availableSpace, lastSize).

nodes.name: QWidgetAnimation
nodes.summary: Animates show/hide transitions on a wrapped QWidget by varying its maximum size property, with three Behavior modes controlling how the target size is calculated.

nodes.name: show
nodes.summary: Starts a size expansion animation to make the widget visible, computing the target size based on the configured Behavior and parent layout geometry.

nodes.name: addterminalstripitemdialog.h
nodes.summary: Declares the AddTerminalStripItemDialog class, a QDialog for adding items to a terminal strip in the QET terminal strip editor.

nodes.name: conductornumexport.h
nodes.summary: Declares the ConductorNumExport class responsible for exporting conductor auto-numbering data to CSV format.

nodes.name: diagrameventaddelement.h
nodes.summary: Declares DiagramEventAddElement, a diagram scene event handler that places a new electrical element on the diagram with each left-click, supporting rotation via the space key.

nodes.name: DiagramEventAddElement
nodes.summary: Scene-level mouse event handler for interactive element placement on a diagram, overriding mouse press/move/release and key events from DiagramEventInterface.

nodes.name: diagrameventaddimage.h
nodes.summary: Declares DiagramEventAddImage, a diagram scene event handler for placing image items on a diagram folio.

nodes.name: diagrameventaddmacro.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements DiagramEventAddMacro, which loads a QET macro file (a compound element+diagram template) and places all its embedded elements and conductors onto the active diagram on user click.

nodes.name: loadMacro
nodes.summary: Reads and parses the macro XML file, integrates embedded element definitions and sub-diagrams into the project, and prepares the preview pixmap item for interactive placement.

nodes.name: addMacro
nodes.summary: Commits all parsed macro elements and conductors onto the diagram at the given scene position, pushing an undo command.

nodes.name: diagrameventaddmacro.h
nodes.summary: Declares DiagramEventAddMacro, a DiagramEventInterface subclass that handles interactive placement of QET macro templates (multi-element compound diagrams) on a diagram folio.

nodes.name: DiagramEventAddMacro
nodes.summary: Scene-level event handler for placing macro templates (compound element+conductor groups) onto a diagram, with preview rendering and undo-stack integration.

nodes.name: diagrameventaddshape.h
nodes.summary: Declares DiagramEventAddShape, a diagram scene event handler for interactively placing geometric shape items (lines, rectangles, ellipses, polygons) on a diagram folio.

nodes.name: diagrameventaddtext.h
nodes.summary: Declares DiagramEventAddText, a diagram scene event handler for placing free-text annotation items on a diagram folio.

nodes.name: diagramview.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements DiagramView, the QGraphicsView-derived widget that renders an editable QET diagram folio, handling drag-and-drop of elements and title blocks, zoom, clipboard cut/copy/paste, mouse and key event routing to pluggable DVEventInterface handlers, and context menus.

nodes.name: DiagramView
nodes.summary: Interactive QGraphicsView for a single Diagram folio, providing zoom, clipboard, drag-and-drop, and pluggable event-interface dispatch; emits signals for mode changes, title changes, and element-find requests.

nodes.name: DiagramView
nodes.summary: Constructor that wires up gesture support, render hints, scene assignment, Qt signal connections for diagram title/scene-rect changes, and context-menu actions including paste and template creation.

nodes.name: keyPressEvent
nodes.summary: Handles keyboard shortcuts for mode switching, scroll-on-arrow-key movement, delete, rotate, and delegation to the active DVEventInterface handler.

nodes.name: contextMenuEvent
nodes.summary: Builds and shows the right-click context menu populated with view-mode-appropriate actions for the current selection.

nodes.name: createTemplateFromSelection
nodes.summary: Serializes the current diagram selection into a QET macro template file, integrating embedded element definitions and saving to the file system.

nodes.name: paste
nodes.summary: Parses clipboard XML and adds the pasted diagram items to the scene at the specified position, clearing existing selection and pushing an undo command.

nodes.name: handleElementDrop
nodes.summary: Processes element drag-drop events by installing the appropriate DiagramEventAddElement or DiagramEventAddMacro handler based on the dropped location type.

nodes.name: scrollOnMovement
nodes.summary: Auto-scrolls the view when arrow keys are held, adjusting scroll speed based on whether a modifier key is pressed.

nodes.name: diagramview.h
nodes.summary: Header for DiagramView; declares the QGraphicsView subclass that hosts an editable electrical diagram folio, with slots for zoom, clipboard operations, mode switching, and conductor reset.

nodes.name: dveventinterface.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements the DVEventInterface base class, providing default no-op implementations of all mouse and keyboard event virtual methods so subclasses only override what they need.

nodes.name: dveventinterface.h
nodes.summary: Declares DVEventInterface, the abstract base class for pluggable diagram-view event handlers that intercept mouse and keyboard events from DiagramView.

nodes.name: DVEventInterface
nodes.summary: Abstract interface that DiagramView delegates input events to, enabling swappable interaction modes such as element placement, shape drawing, or text insertion.
nodes.languageNotes: Pure virtual destructor makes this a proper abstract base; subclasses return true/false to indicate whether they consumed the event.

nodes.name: elementdialog.h
nodes.summary: Declares ElementDialog, a configurable QDialog for browsing the element collection tree to open or save elements and categories, with static factory methods for common use cases.

nodes.name: ElementDialog
nodes.summary: Modal dialog that presents a tree view of the elements collection and returns the selected ElementsLocation; configured for open-element, save-element, open-category, or save-template modes.

nodes.name: projectprintwindow.h
nodes.summary: Declares ProjectPrintWindow, a QMainWindow providing print preview, page setup, and PDF export for all diagrams in a QETProject, with per-diagram selection checkboxes.

nodes.name: ProjectPrintWindow
nodes.summary: Print-preview window for a QET project; handles page layout, orientation, zoom, per-diagram selection, date stamping, and PDF/native printer output.

nodes.name: projectview.h
nodes.summary: Declares ProjectView, a tabbed QWidget that hosts one DiagramView per folio in a QETProject, managing diagram addition, removal, reordering, save/load, and read-only state.

nodes.name: ProjectView
nodes.summary: Tabbed widget container for all DiagramView folios of a single QETProject; handles diagram lifecycle (add, remove, move, save), macOS wheel-tab navigation, and forwards find-element signals.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses a platform-specific WheelEnabledTabBar on macOS (Q_OS_MACOS guard) to support mouse-wheel tab switching via QWheelEvent::angleDelta().

nodes.name: qetdiagrameditor.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements QETDiagramEditor, the application's main window; sets up all menus, toolbars, docks, the MDI workspace, undo groups, and orchestrates project open/close/save, diagram management, and editor-wide action state updates.

nodes.name: QETDiagramEditor
nodes.summary: Main window of the QElectroTech diagram editor; owns the MDI area, project management, all QActions, toolbars, docks for element collection and undo, and coordinates multi-project workflows.

nodes.name: qetdiagrameditor.h
nodes.summary: Header for QETDiagramEditor, the central main window class of the diagram editor, inheriting QETMainWindow and hosting the MDI area, all action groups, project management slots, and dock widgets.

nodes.name: qetmainwindow.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements QETMainWindow, the shared base class for QET top-level windows, initializing common Help and Settings menus, full-screen toggle, toolbar visibility menus, and first-activation handling.

nodes.name: QETMainWindow
nodes.summary: Abstract base main window for QElectroTech top-level editors, providing shared Help/Settings menus, full-screen toggle, toolbar-visibility tracking, and a first-activation hook.

nodes.name: qetmainwindow.h
nodes.summary: Declares QETMainWindow, the abstract QMainWindow base class shared by all QET top-level editor windows, providing full-screen toggle, common menu scaffolding, and a first-activation virtual hook.

nodes.name: qetxml.cpp
nodes.summary: Provides standalone XML serialization and deserialization helpers for diagram items (elements, conductors, text items, images, shapes, dynamic text, table items), used by clipboard, undo, and file I/O operations throughout the application.

nodes.name: diagrameditorhandlersizewidget.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements DiagramEditorHandlerSizeWidget, a compact UI widget for adjusting the handle-size setting of the diagram editor selection handles.

nodes.name: diagrameditorhandlersizewidget.h
nodes.summary: Declares DiagramEditorHandlerSizeWidget, a small widget exposing a slider or spin-box for configuring the size of selection-handle adornments in the diagram editor.

nodes.name: multipastedialog.h
nodes.summary: Declares MultiPasteDialog, a dialog that configures and executes multiple-paste operations (grid or offset repetition) for copied diagram content.

nodes.name: terminalnumberingdialog.h
nodes.summary: Declares TerminalNumberingDialog, a dialog for configuring automatic terminal numbering schemes applied to terminal strip elements.

nodes.name: rotateselectioncommand.h
nodes.summary: Declares RotateSelectionCommand, a QUndoCommand that rotates all selected diagram elements and text items by 90 degrees with full undo/redo support.

nodes.name: rotatetextscommand.h
nodes.summary: Declares RotateTextsCommand, a QUndoCommand that rotates selected diagram text items to a user-specified angle with full undo/redo support.

nodes.name: conductorcreator.h
nodes.summary: Declares ConductorCreator, a utility for programmatically creating and connecting conductors between two terminals on a diagram, used by paste and macro placement operations.

nodes.name: wiringlistexport.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements WiringListExport, which parses a QETProject's XML graph to collect conductor and element endpoint data, resolves linked/placeholder elements to physical terminals, and exports a structured wiring list (Verdrahtungsplan) as a CSV file.

nodes.name: wiringlistexport.h
nodes.summary: Declares WiringListExport and its supporting data structs (ElementInfo, ConductorData) for collecting and exporting conductor wiring lists from a QET project to CSV.

nodes.name: WiringListExport
nodes.summary: Parses QET project XML to build conductor/endpoint graphs, resolves linked placeholder elements, and writes the result as a wiring-list CSV file.

nodes.name: elementtextpattern.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements export and import of element text layout patterns, allowing users to save and reapply named text position/formatting configurations across elements.

nodes.name: elementtextpattern.h
nodes.summary: Header declaring the ExportElementTextPattern and ImportElementTextPattern utility classes for persisting element text layout patterns to/from named XML files.

nodes.name: elementtextsmover.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements ElementTextsMover, a helper class that tracks drag movement of element text items and text groups and commits undo commands on release.

nodes.name: elementtextsmover.h
nodes.summary: Header declaring ElementTextsMover, which coordinates interactive drag-and-drop repositioning of dynamic element text items and text groups with undo support.

nodes.name: exportdialog.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements the ExportDialog and ExportDiagramLine UI classes for exporting QET project diagrams to image (PNG/JPG), SVG, and DXF formats with per-diagram size and ratio controls.
nodes.languageNotes: Contains a large generateDxf() function spanning nearly 250 lines and a rotation_transformed helper function for DXF coordinate transformation.

nodes.name: elementfactory.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements the ElementFactory singleton that instantiates the correct Element subclass (Simple, Master, Slave, Report) based on an XML kind attribute.

nodes.name: propertieseditorfactory.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements PropertiesEditorFactory, which maps diagram graphics items (elements, conductors, text items, shapes, tables) to their corresponding properties editor widgets.

nodes.name: terminaldata.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements TerminalData, the data object describing a terminal connector's position, orientation, name, type, and UUID, with XML serialization and type-string conversion helpers.

nodes.name: terminaldata.h
nodes.summary: Declares the TerminalData class representing terminal connector metadata (position, name, orientation, type) with XML serialization interface.

nodes.name: qetgraphicstableitem.h
nodes.summary: Declares QetGraphicsTableItem, a QGraphicsObject-based table widget for embedding tabular data (e.g. terminal strip tables) directly in a diagram scene.

nodes.name: conductor.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements the Conductor class: the interactive wire/bus connecting two terminals in a diagram, including path generation, XML persistence, text label positioning, auto-numbering, and undo-aware drag editing.
nodes.languageNotes: At 2112 lines this is one of the largest files in the project; it includes the helper ConductorXmlRetroCompatibility namespace for backward-compatible XML loading.

nodes.name: conductor.h
nodes.summary: Declares the Conductor class (QGraphicsObject) representing an electrical wire between two terminals, exposing path profiles, properties, text label, and XML serialization.

nodes.name: conductortextitem.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements ConductorTextItem, the floating label attached to a conductor, supporting XML round-trip and focus-out undo command emission.

nodes.name: conductortextitem.h
nodes.summary: Declares ConductorTextItem extending DiagramTextItem, the moveable text label associated with a Conductor on the diagram.

nodes.name: crossrefitem.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements CrossRefItem, the graphical cross-reference indicator that renders linked NO/NC contact positions for master coil elements in IEC-style diagrams.
nodes.languageNotes: Over 1000 lines; includes multiple paint paths for cross-style and contact-list visual modes, hover interaction, and autopos logic.

nodes.name: crossrefitem.h
nodes.summary: Declares CrossRefItem (QGraphicsObject), the cross-reference symbol attached to master elements, exposing linked element lists and rendering configuration.

nodes.name: diagramimageitem.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements DiagramImageItem, a QGraphicsObject that embeds a raster image on the diagram, with base64 XML serialization and interactive scaling/rotation.

nodes.name: diagramimageitem.h
nodes.summary: Declares DiagramImageItem, the QGraphicsObject subclass for placing raster images within a diagram scene.

nodes.name: diagramtextitem.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements DiagramTextItem, the base QGraphicsTextItem used for all editable text on diagrams, providing font/color control, alignment, HTML editing, and drag movement mapping.

nodes.name: diagramtextitem.h
nodes.summary: Declares DiagramTextItem, the common base class for all text items on a QET diagram scene, extending QGraphicsTextItem with alignment, color, and frame support.

nodes.name: dynamicelementtextitem.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements DynamicElementTextItem, a text item that can display static text, element information fields, or formula-composed labels, with cross-reference auto-positioning and full XML persistence.
nodes.languageNotes: 1505 lines; uses Qt meta-enum reflection for text-source type persistence, and connects to element info change signals dynamically.

nodes.name: dynamicelementtextitem.h
nodes.summary: Declares DynamicElementTextItem, the richest text item in QET that supports static text, element info fields, and formula-driven content with XML round-trip.

nodes.name: element.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements the Element base class for all schematic symbols, handling terminal management, conductor connectivity, dynamic text items, text groups, XML persistence, and element linking.
nodes.languageNotes: 1557 lines; the central base class from which SimpleElement, MasterElement, SlaveElement, and ReportElement all derive.

nodes.name: element.h
nodes.summary: Declares the Element base class for all electrical schematic symbols, defining the interface for terminals, conductors, text items, XML serialization, and inter-element linking.

nodes.name: elementtextitemgroup.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements ElementTextItemGroup, a QGraphicsItemGroup that clusters DynamicElementTextItems together with shared alignment, cross-reference snapping, and undo-aware position management.

nodes.name: elementtextitemgroup.h
nodes.summary: Declares ElementTextItemGroup, the grouped text container for element text items with alignment, XML persistence, and xref-aware positioning.

nodes.name: independenttextitem.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements IndependentTextItem, a freely placeable text annotation on a diagram that is not attached to any element, with XML serialization and undo-committed text editing.

nodes.name: independenttextitem.h
nodes.summary: Declares IndependentTextItem, the standalone text annotation class for use on diagrams without element attachment.

nodes.name: masterelement.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements MasterElement, the coil-type element that can link to multiple SlaveElements, manages cross-reference item lifecycle, and enforces maximum slave count via isFull().

nodes.name: masterelement.h
nodes.summary: Declares MasterElement, which extends Element to represent coil-type symbols that own a cross-reference item and link to slave contact elements.

nodes.name: generateDxf
nodes.summary: Exports a diagram to DXF format by iterating over all diagram items (elements, conductors, text, images, shapes) and writing DXF entity records via the Createdxf helper.

nodes.name: generateSvg
nodes.summary: Renders a diagram to SVG output using Qt's QSvgGenerator, with configurable viewport dimensions and aspect ratio.

nodes.name: exportDiagram
nodes.summary: Dispatches export of a single diagram to the appropriate format handler (image, SVG, or DXF) based on the user-selected file extension.

nodes.name: generateConductorPath
nodes.summary: Computes a new conductor segment path from scratch given two terminal dock points and orientations, producing a Manhattan-routed segment list.

nodes.name: calculateTextItemPosition
nodes.summary: Determines the optimal position and rotation of the conductor's text label based on the longest horizontal or vertical segment.

nodes.name: relatedPotentialConductors
nodes.summary: Traverses the network graph of conductors sharing the same electrical potential and returns the set of all related conductors, optionally crossing diagram boundaries.

nodes.name: toXml
nodes.summary: Serializes a Conductor and its text label, path segments, and conductor properties to a QDomElement for project file persistence.

nodes.name: fromXml
nodes.summary: Restores a Conductor's properties and text label from a QDomElement, delegating path reconstruction to pathFromXml.

nodes.name: paint
nodes.summary: Dispatches painting of the cross-reference item to either cross-table or contact-list rendering mode based on current properties.

nodes.name: drawContact
nodes.summary: Paints an individual linked contact element's folio reference text and symbol within the cross-reference contact list, handling both NO and NC contact types.

nodes.name: fillCrossRef
nodes.summary: Populates the cross-style cross-reference table with folio position text for each linked NO and NC contact element.

nodes.name: fromXml
nodes.summary: Restores an Element and all its terminals, dynamic text items, and text groups from an XML element node, including backward-compatible loading.

nodes.name: toXml
nodes.summary: Serializes an Element including its position, rotation, dynamic text items, text groups, and kind-specific data to a QDomElement.

nodes.name: buildFromXml
nodes.summary: Constructs the element's graphical primitives (lines, rectangles, circles, arcs, terminals) from the XML element definition file.

nodes.name: toXml
nodes.summary: Serializes a DynamicElementTextItem including text-source type, info name, composite text formula, rotation, alignment and font to a QDomElement.

nodes.name: fromXml
nodes.summary: Restores a DynamicElementTextItem's text-source type, info name, formula, position and formatting from an XML element.

nodes.name: setTextFrom
nodes.summary: Changes the text source mode (static/element-info/composite), connecting or disconnecting element info change signals as appropriate.

nodes.name: addToGroup
nodes.summary: Adds a DynamicElementTextItem to the group, connecting its change signals for alignment, xref and position updates.

nodes.name: updateXref
nodes.summary: Updates the cross-reference slave label text in the group by resolving the master element's xref formula and adjusting the xref item position.

nodes.name: linkToElement
nodes.summary: Links a SlaveElement to this MasterElement, adding it to the linked-elements list and triggering cross-reference updates.

nodes.name: xrefPropertiesChanged
nodes.summary: Responds to project-level cross-reference property changes by snapping the cross-reference item to the correct position on this element.

nodes.name: toXml
nodes.summary: Serializes all terminal descriptor fields (position, name, orientation, UUID, type) to a QDomElement.

nodes.name: fromXml
nodes.summary: Restores terminal descriptor fields from a QDomElement, with defaults for missing attributes.

nodes.name: propertieseditordialog.h
nodes.summary: Header declaring PropertiesEditorDialog, a Qt dialog base class that wires OK/Cancel/Apply/Reset button roles via QDialogButtonBox signals in its constructor.

nodes.name: terminalstripitem.h
nodes.summary: Header declaring TerminalStripItem, a QGraphicsItem subclass for rendering a terminal strip on the diagram canvas.

nodes.name: addterminalstripitemdialog.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements AddTerminalStripItemDialog, a dialog that lets users select a terminal strip from a project and place a new TerminalStripItem on the diagram at a chosen position.

nodes.name: assignvariables.cpp
nodes.summary: Core auto-numbering variable assignment logic: resolves formula variables (element position, folio, plant, locmach, title block fields, sequences) into concrete labels for elements and conductors.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses a rich struct sequentialNumbers with six QStringList fields for sequential label components, serialised to/from DOM XML.

nodes.name: formulaToLabel
nodes.summary: Entry-point that converts a formula string to a resolved label by delegating to replaceVariable, using diagram, element, and conductor context.

nodes.name: replaceVariable
nodes.summary: Performs all token substitution in a formula string using a DiagramContext map, replacing named variable tokens with their current string values.

nodes.name: AssignVariables
nodes.summary: Constructor that builds a fully resolved label from a formula by substituting element properties (plant, locmach, position, prefix), title block vars, project vars, and sequences.

nodes.name: setSequential
nodes.summary: Assigns sequential counter values into a formula string for a given diagram and hash key, handling both global and per-folio sequences.

nodes.name: numerotationContextToFormula
nodes.summary: Converts a NumerotationContext (ordered list of numbering items) into a formula string by mapping each item type to its canonical formula token.

nodes.name: elementPrefixForLocation
nodes.summary: Determines the element prefix string for a given ElementsLocation by searching the project's element collections and reading element XML data.

nodes.name: numerotationcontextcommands.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements the NumerotationContextCommands strategy hierarchy, providing next/previous/toRepresentedString operations for all numbering types: unit, ten, hundred, folio, plant, locmach, element line/column/prefix, and string sequences.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses the Strategy design pattern; setNumStrategy() returns the correct concrete NumStrategy subclass for each NumerotationContext item type.

nodes.name: setNumStrategy
nodes.summary: Factory method that maps a NumerotationContext item type string to the appropriate NumStrategy subclass instance for incrementing or decrementing that numbering component.

nodes.name: numerotationcontextcommands.h
nodes.summary: Declares the NumerotationContextCommands interface and all concrete NumStrategy subclasses (UnitNum, TenNum, HundredNum, StringNum, FolioNum, PlantNum, LocmachNum, ElementLineNum, ElementColumnNum, ElementPrefixNum) used to drive auto-numbering.

nodes.name: conductorautonumerotation.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements ConductorAutoNumerotation, which assigns sequential numbering to conductors either across an equipotential group (numeratePotential) or to a newly placed conductor (numerateNewConductor).

nodes.name: applyText
nodes.summary: Applies a resolved label string to all conductors in an equipotential group, updating their properties and pushing an undo command to the diagram's undo stack.

nodes.name: numeratePotential
nodes.summary: Numerates all conductors in an equipotential group, either propagating an existing label uniformly or generating a new one via newProperties.

nodes.name: numerateNewConductor
nodes.summary: Generates and applies a new sequential label to a conductor that has no existing potential-group label, updating the project's auto-num context.

nodes.name: conductorautonumerotation.h
nodes.summary: Header declaring ConductorAutoNumerotation, the service class that manages automatic sequential labelling of conductors using the project's numbering context.

nodes.name: conductornumexport.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements ConductorNumExport, which collects all numbered conductor labels across a project's diagrams and exports them to a CSV file via a save-file dialog.

nodes.name: conductorprofile.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements ConductorProfile, which stores and queries the geometric profile of a conductor: its list of ConductorSegmentProfile entries, width/height, and horizontal/vertical segment counts.

nodes.name: conductorprofile.h
nodes.summary: Header declaring ConductorProfile, which captures the routing geometry of a conductor as a list of ConductorSegmentProfile entries.

nodes.name: conductorsegment.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements ConductorSegment, the individual horizontal or vertical segment node in a conductor's doubly-linked segment list, providing constraint-aware movement along both axes.
nodes.languageNotes: Each segment forms a doubly-linked list (previousSegment/nextSegment); movement methods enforce boundary constraints using canMove queries before applying delta offsets.

nodes.name: canMove1stPointX
nodes.summary: Computes the maximum allowable X-axis delta for the segment's first point, respecting neighbouring-segment constraints.

nodes.name: canMove2ndPointX
nodes.summary: Computes the maximum allowable X-axis delta for the segment's second point, respecting neighbouring-segment constraints.

nodes.name: canMove1stPointY
nodes.summary: Computes the maximum allowable Y-axis delta for the segment's first point, respecting neighbouring-segment constraints.

nodes.name: canMove2ndPointY
nodes.summary: Computes the maximum allowable Y-axis delta for the segment's second point, respecting neighbouring-segment constraints.

nodes.name: moveX
nodes.summary: Moves this vertical segment laterally by a constrained delta, adjusting endpoint coordinates and propagating updates to adjacent segments.

nodes.name: moveY
nodes.summary: Moves this horizontal segment vertically by a constrained delta, adjusting endpoint coordinates and propagating updates to adjacent segments.

nodes.name: conductorsegment.h
nodes.summary: Header declaring ConductorSegment, a doubly-linked node representing one horizontal or vertical segment of a conductor's routed path.

nodes.name: conductorsegmentprofile.h
nodes.summary: Header declaring ConductorSegmentProfile, a lightweight struct capturing the length and orientation of a single conductor segment for profile storage.

nodes.name: diagram.cpp
nodes.summary: Core implementation of the Diagram class (QGraphicsScene subclass) covering XML serialisation/deserialisation of all scene items, mouse/keyboard event dispatch through the DiagramEventInterface, conductor auto-numbering, folio sequential tracking, and item add/remove lifecycle management.
nodes.languageNotes: At 2628 lines this is the largest file in the batch; toXml/fromXml handle every item type (elements, conductors, shapes, images, text, tables, terminal strips) plus folio-sequential hashes.

nodes.name: Diagram
nodes.summary: Constructs the Diagram scene, sets item index method, initialises the border/title-block item, wires conductor text refresh signals, and connects title/template change slots.

nodes.name: keyPressEvent
nodes.summary: Handles keyboard input on the diagram scene: arrow keys move selected items via ElementsMover, Delete removes them, Escape clears the event interface, and remaining keys are delegated to the current DiagramEventInterface.

nodes.name: toXml
nodes.summary: Serialises the entire diagram scene to a DOM document, writing border properties, all element/conductor/text/image/shape/table items, and folio-sequential hashes.

nodes.name: fromXml
nodes.summary: Deserialises a complete diagram from a DOM document, reconstructing all elements, conductors, text items, images, shapes, tables, and terminal-strip items with position and link restoration.

nodes.name: addItem
nodes.summary: Overrides QGraphicsScene::addItem to dispatch type-specific registration: adding elements to the DB, conductors to both terminal endpoints, and scheduling text position correction.

nodes.name: removeItem
nodes.summary: Overrides QGraphicsScene::removeItem to dispatch type-specific cleanup: unlinking elements and removing conductors from both terminal endpoints before removing from the scene.

nodes.name: changeZValue
nodes.summary: Adjusts the Z-order of selected items relative to all other items, supporting bring-to-front, send-to-back, raise, and lower operations.

nodes.name: loadElmtFolioSeq
nodes.summary: Loads folio-sequential numbering hashes for elements from the project's auto-number context, distributing sequences across element/conductor/text number hashes.

nodes.name: correctTextPos
nodes.summary: Restores dynamic element text item positions invalidated by XML-loading by re-computing variable substitutions from element info keys and updating plain text content.

nodes.name: diagram.h
nodes.summary: Central header declaring the Diagram class (QGraphicsScene), its public API, signals, slots, member variables, and nested helper structs for conductor preview lines and border options.

nodes.name: diagramcommands.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements QUndoCommand subclasses for diagram editing operations: paste, cut, move conductor labels, change diagram text, change conductor routing, reset conductor profiles, and change border properties.

nodes.name: diagramcommands.h
nodes.summary: Declares all QUndoCommand subclasses used by the diagram editor: PasteDiagramCommand, CutDiagramCommand, MoveConductorsTextsCommand, ChangeDiagramTextCommand, ChangeConductorCommand, ResetConductorCommand, and ChangeBorderCommand.

nodes.name: diagramcontent.cpp

nodes.summary: Header declaring the EllipseEditor widget for editing ellipse primitive properties in the QET element editor.

nodes.name: qetelementeditor.h

nodes.summary: Rectangle property editor panel with position, size, and corner radius spin boxes, each committing changes to the element scene undo stack on editing finished.

nodes.name: rectangleeditor.h
nodes.summary: Header declaring the RectangleEditor widget for editing rectangle primitive position, size, and corner radius in the QET element editor.

nodes.name: terminaleditor.h
nodes.summary: Header declaring the TerminalEditor widget for editing terminal primitive position, orientation, name, and type in the QET element editor.

nodes.name: texteditor.h
nodes.summary: Header declaring the TextEditor widget for editing static text primitive properties in the QET element editor.

nodes.name: partline.h
nodes.summary: Header declaring the PartLine class, a QGraphicsItem subtype representing a styled line primitive within the QET element editor's scene.

nodes.name: partpolygon.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements PartPolygon, an interactive polygon graphic primitive for the element editor that supports XML serialization, drag handles for vertex editing, undo/redo integration, and closed/open polygon toggling.

nodes.name: PartPolygon
nodes.summary: Interactive polygon graphics part supporting vertex insertion/removal, drag handles, undo stack integration, and XML round-trip serialization.

nodes.name: partpolygon.h
nodes.summary: Header declaring the PartPolygon class, an interactive polygon primitive for the QET element editor with vertex manipulation and style support.

nodes.name: partrectangle.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements PartRectangle, a rounded rectangle graphic primitive for the element editor supporting corner radius, drag handles for resizing, rotation, flip/mirror, and XML serialization.

nodes.name: PartRectangle
nodes.summary: Rectangle graphic part with configurable corner radii, interactive resize handles, rotation/flip/mirror, and undo-aware geometry editing.

nodes.name: partrectangle.h
nodes.summary: Header declaring the PartRectangle class, a styled rounded-rectangle primitive for the QET element editor scene.

nodes.name: partterminal.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements PartTerminal, the electrical terminal connector primitive for element definitions, with orientation, type, name, and UUID management, and XML serialization delegating to the Terminal class.

nodes.name: PartTerminal
nodes.summary: Terminal connection point primitive that manages orientation, type, naming, UUID, and IEC-style visual rendering inside the element editor scene.

nodes.name: partterminal.h
nodes.summary: Header declaring the PartTerminal class, the electrical terminal primitive used in the element editor with orientation and type properties.

nodes.name: parttext.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements PartText, a QGraphicsTextItem-derived static text primitive for element definitions supporting in-place editing, font/color, rotation, undo integration, and XML serialization.

nodes.name: PartText
nodes.summary: Static text graphic part derived from QGraphicsTextItem supporting in-place editing activation on double-click, font/color control, rotation, flip/mirror, and undo-aware property changes.

nodes.name: parttext.h
nodes.summary: Header declaring the PartText class, a static text label primitive for the QET element editor with in-place editing and XML serialization.

nodes.name: styleeditor.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements StyleEditor, a Qt widget panel that lets users edit visual style properties (color, line style, weight, fill, antialiasing) of one or more selected CustomElementGraphicPart primitives, using undo commands for all changes.
nodes.languageNotes: Constructor populates a large number of QComboBox entries covering all supported pen colors, dash patterns, weights, and fill modes as defined in the QET style system.

nodes.name: StyleEditor
nodes.summary: Property editor panel for graphic part styling — manages antialiasing, color, line style, line weight, and fill combo boxes and applies changes atomically via QPropertyUndoCommand.

nodes.name: styleeditor.h
nodes.summary: Header declaring the StyleEditor widget for editing graphical style attributes of element primitives in the QET element editor.

nodes.name: RotateElementsCommand
nodes.summary: QUndoCommand that rotates all selected element primitives by 90 degrees, with type-dispatched rotation on each concrete part subtype.

nodes.name: MirrorElementsCommand
nodes.summary: QUndoCommand that horizontally mirrors all selected element primitives using each part's mirror() method; undo delegates to redo since mirroring is self-inverse.

nodes.name: scale
nodes.summary: Applies startUserTransformation/handleUserTransformation to each primitive to scale from the original rect to the target rect.

nodes.name: fromXml
nodes.summary: Deserializes element primitives from an XML document, instantiating each part type by tag name and adding it to the scene.

nodes.name: toXml

nodes.summary: Updates the in-progress arc primitive's bounding rect in real time as the user drags the mouse during arc creation.

nodes.name: qpropertyundocommand.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements QPropertyUndoCommand, a reusable Qt undo/redo command that applies arbitrary QObject property changes with optional QVariantAnimation support for animated transitions.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses QVariantAnimation to animate property value transitions between old and new values on redo/undo.

nodes.name: qpropertyundocommand.h
nodes.summary: Declares QPropertyUndoCommand class, a generic QUndoCommand subclass for property-level undo/redo with animation support in the element editor.

nodes.name: qetgraphicshandleritem.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements QetGraphicsHandlerItem, a small circular drag-handle QGraphicsItem used to resize/reposition element primitives in the element editor, with hover animation.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses QPropertyAnimation on a custom 'size' property to animate handler circle growth on hover enter/leave.

nodes.name: qetgraphicshandleritem.h
nodes.summary: Declares QetGraphicsHandlerItem, the interactive circular resize-handle graphics item used by ElementPrimitiveDecorator.

nodes.name: qetgraphicshandlerutility.cpp
nodes.summary: Provides a collection of pure geometry utility functions (in namespace QetGraphicsHandlerUtility) that compute handle positions for rectangles, lines, arcs, and polygons, and compute new geometry from dragged handle positions.
nodes.languageNotes: All functions live in a namespace rather than a class, consistent with stateless utility design.

nodes.name: qetgraphicshandlerutility.h
nodes.summary: Declares the QetGraphicsHandlerUtility namespace with geometry helper functions for computing handler point positions and updated geometry from dragged handles.

nodes.name: addpartcommand.cpp

nodes.name: addpartcommand.h

nodes.name: deletepartscommand.cpp

nodes.name: deletepartscommand.h
nodes.summary: Declares DeletePartsCommand, the undo command for bulk deletion of element primitives from an ElementScene.

nodes.name: openelmtcommand.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements OpenElmtCommand, a QUndoCommand that opens an element from an XML document into the editor scene by deserializing parts on redo and removing them on undo.

nodes.name: openelmtcommand.h
nodes.summary: Declares OpenElmtCommand, the undo command for loading an element from XML into the element editor scene.

nodes.summary: Implements PastePartsCommand, a QUndoCommand that pastes a set of copied element primitives into the editor scene, assigning new UUIDs to terminals and computing paste offsets.

nodes.name: pastepartscommand.h
nodes.summary: Declares PastePartsCommand, the undo command for pasting element parts into an ElementView/ElementScene.

nodes.name: arceditor.cpp

nodes.name: arceditor.h
nodes.summary: Declares ArcEditor, the UI panel widget for editing arc geometry properties in the element editor.

nodes.name: editorcommands.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements a suite of QUndoCommand subclasses for the element editor: move, cut, z-order changes, rename, scale, data changes, and rotate/mirror/flip operations on element primitives.

nodes.name: editorcommands.h
nodes.summary: Declares the full set of element editor QUndoCommand subclasses including ElementEditionCommand base class, move, cut, z-order, rename, scale, rotate, mirror, and flip commands.

nodes.name: elementcontent.h

nodes.name: elementitemeditor.h

nodes.name: elementprimitivedecorator.h
nodes.summary: Declares ElementPrimitiveDecorator, the selection-box overlay QGraphicsObject with resize handles for element editor primitives.

nodes.name: elementscene.cpp

nodes.name: elementscene.h

nodes.name: elementview.h

nodes.name: AddPartCommand

nodes.summary: QUndoCommand that removes a collection of element primitives from an ElementScene on redo and restores them on undo.

nodes.summary: QUndoCommand that pastes a clipboard copy of element parts into an ElementView, assigning fresh UUIDs to terminals and maintaining paste offset state.

nodes.name: ArcEditor

nodes.name: ElementPrimitiveDecorator

nodes.name: ElementView

nodes.name: ElementView

nodes.name: replaceconductordialog.h

nodes.name: replaceelementdialog.h

nodes.name: replacefoliowidget.h
nodes.summary: Header declaring ReplaceFolioWidget and ReplaceFolioDialog, exposing title block property get/set interfaces for the folio replacement UI.

nodes.name: searchandreplacewidget.h

nodes.name: elementquerywidget.h

nodes.name: exportproperties.h

nodes.name: elementcollectionhandler.h

nodes.name: canDropMimeData

nodes.name: toXmlAttribute

nodes.name: fromXmlAttribute
nodes.summary: Reads and returns a QVersionNumber from the 'version' attribute of a QDomElement, returning a null version if the attribute is absent.

nodes.name: buildMenu

nodes.name: extractFilesFromSettings
nodes.summary: Reads recent file paths from QSettings using the configured identifier prefix and populates the internal list.

nodes.name: toXml
nodes.summary: Serializes all TitleBlockProperties fields as attributes of the provided QDomElement, including optional context child element.

nodes.name: fromXml
nodes.summary: Deserializes TitleBlockProperties from a QDomElement, reading all standard attributes and an optional child properties element for custom context fields.

nodes.name: toSettings
nodes.summary: Writes all TitleBlockProperties fields to a QSettings object using the given prefix.

nodes.name: fromSettings
nodes.summary: Reads TitleBlockProperties fields from a QSettings object using the given prefix.

nodes.name: setHdpiScaleFactorRoundingPolicy

nodes.name: hdpiScaleFactorRoundingPolicy
nodes.summary: Reads and returns the stored HDPI scale factor rounding policy enum from QSettings, falling back to a caller-supplied default.

nodes.name: projectconfigpages.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements the project configuration pages for QElectroTech's ConfigDialog: the general project settings page (ProjectMainConfigPage) and the auto-numbering page (ProjectAutoNumConfigPage) for conductor, element, and folio numerotation contexts.

nodes.name: projectconfigpages.h

nodes.name: diagramcontextwidget.cpp

nodes.name: diagramcontextwidget.h

nodes.name: diagrampropertiesdialog.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements DiagramPropertiesDialog, a modal dialog for editing a single diagram's border, title block, and default conductor properties; pushes undo commands on change acceptance.

nodes.name: diagrampropertiesdialog.h
nodes.summary: Declares DiagramPropertiesDialog, a QDialog subclass for editing individual diagram properties including border, title block, and conductor settings.

nodes.name: projectpropertiesdialog.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements ProjectPropertiesDialog, which assembles a ConfigDialog with pages for project main settings, new-diagram defaults, auto-numbering, and terminal strip configuration, wiring inter-page signals.

nodes.name: projectpropertiesdialog.h

nodes.name: reportpropertiewidget.cpp

nodes.name: reportpropertiewidget.h

nodes.name: titleblockpropertieswidget.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements TitleBlockPropertiesWidget, a rich form widget for editing diagram title block properties including template selection, author, date, folio numbering, and custom context fields; supports multiple template collection sources.

nodes.name: titleblockpropertieswidget.h

nodes.name: xrefpropertieswidget.cpp

nodes.name: xrefpropertieswidget.h
nodes.summary: Declares XRefPropertiesWidget, a QWidget subclass that edits a QHash of XRefProperties keyed by element type string.

nodes.name: changetitleblockcommand.cpp

nodes.name: changetitleblockcommand.h

nodes.name: terminalstriplayoutpatternxml.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements TerminalStripLayoutPatternXml, providing static toXml and fromXml methods for serializing and deserializing TerminalStripLayoutPattern objects (header, spacer, terminals, bridges, text orientation) to/from QDomElement.

nodes.name: terminalstriplayoutpatternxml.h
nodes.summary: Declares TerminalStripLayoutPatternXml, a utility class with static toXml and fromXml overloads for XML persistence of TerminalStripLayoutPattern vectors and individual instances.

nodes.name: ProjectConfigPage
nodes.summary: Abstract base class for project configuration pages, providing the project reference, applyConf/init lifecycle methods, and enforcing the initWidgets/initLayout/readValuesFromProject/adjustReadOnly protocol on subclasses.

nodes.name: ProjectMainConfigPage
nodes.summary: Configuration page for editing the project title and custom project-level diagram context variables (used in title block substitutions).

nodes.name: ProjectAutoNumConfigPage
nodes.summary: Configuration page providing tabbed UI for managing auto-numbering contexts (conductors, elements, folios) and folio auto-numbering, wiring save/remove/update slot patterns for each context type.

nodes.name: DiagramContextWidget
nodes.summary: A QWidget that presents DiagramContext key-value pairs in an editable table, automatically appending empty rows, highlighting invalid keys, and updating a format-hint label.

nodes.name: DiagramPropertiesDialog
nodes.summary: Modal dialog that aggregates border, title block, and conductor property widgets for a single Diagram, pushing undo commands for each changed property on acceptance.

nodes.name: ProjectPropertiesDialog
nodes.summary: Orchestrator for the project properties dialog, assembling ConfigDialog with Main, Diagram, Autonum, and TerminalStrip pages and exposing setCurrentPage and changeToFolio navigation.

nodes.name: ReportPropertieWidget
nodes.summary: Minimal form widget for a single report label string, providing get/set accessors and a toSettings convenience method.

nodes.name: TitleBlockPropertiesWidget
nodes.summary: Rich QWidget for editing TitleBlockProperties including template selection from multiple collections, date modes, folio auto-numbering, and context key-value pairs via an embedded DiagramContextWidget.

nodes.name: XRefPropertiesWidget
nodes.summary: Form widget editing a per-type QHash of XRefProperties, supporting coil, protection, and commutator element types with display mode, snap position, offset, and prefix configuration.

nodes.name: ChangeTitleBlockCommand

nodes.name: TerminalStripLayoutPatternXml
nodes.summary: Stateless utility class with four static methods providing XML serialization and deserialization for individual and vector collections of TerminalStripLayoutPattern objects.

nodes.name: autonumberingmanagementw.cpp

nodes.name: formulaautonumberingw.h

nodes.name: numparteditorw.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements NumPartEditorW, a QWidget for editing a single numbering part (type, value, increment) within a NumerotationContext, supporting 14 distinct part types for elements, conductors, and folios.

nodes.name: numparteditorw.h

nodes.name: selectautonumw.cpp

nodes.name: selectautonumw.h
nodes.summary: Declares SelectAutonumW, a QWidget subclass that aggregates multiple NumPartEditorW widgets and a formula display to build and edit a complete NumerotationContext.

nodes.name: AutoNumberingManagementW
nodes.summary: QWidget that manages auto-numbering update policies for a project, controlling folio range selection and status presets for conductor, element, and folio numbering.

nodes.name: FormulaAutonumberingW
nodes.summary: Small QWidget for displaying and editing the formula string used in element auto-numbering; emits textChanged when the user edits the formula.

nodes.name: NumPartEditorW
nodes.summary: QWidget for editing one part of a NumerotationContext, with 14 type variants (numeric, folio, string, element attributes) and validity checking.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses a local enum `type` with 14 variants to represent all numbering part types; type-dispatch is handled via long if/else chains rather than polymorphism.

nodes.name: SelectAutonumW
nodes.summary: Composite QWidget that manages a dynamic list of NumPartEditorW parts alongside a FormulaAutonumberingW, providing next/previous context navigation and apply/reset actions for auto-numbering contexts.

nodes.name: toNumContext
nodes.summary: Converts the widget's current type, value, and increment fields into a NumerotationContext entry, with special handling for folio-relative types.

nodes.name: setType
nodes.summary: Configures widget field enabled/disabled state and input validators based on the requested numbering part type, distinguishing numeric from text and auto-derived types.

nodes.name: setContext
nodes.summary: Rebuilds the list of NumPartEditorW widgets from a NumerotationContext, wiring each part's changed signal to the applyEnable slot.

nodes.name: contextToFormula
nodes.summary: Converts the current NumerotationContext to a formula string and pushes it into the FormulaAutonumberingW display widget.

nodes.name: borderproperties.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements the BorderProperties class, providing constructor defaults, equality operators, and XML/QSettings serialisation and deserialisation for diagram border and title-block dimension properties.

nodes.name: borderproperties.h
nodes.summary: Declares the BorderProperties struct-like class, which holds column and row count, width/height, and display flag properties for a QET diagram border.
nodes.languageNotes: Public attributes with no accessors — intentionally a plain data holder (struct idiom in a class) used by the diagram border renderer.

nodes.name: BorderProperties
nodes.summary: Plain data class encapsulating all dimensional and visibility properties for a diagram's column/row border, with XML and QSettings persistence methods.

nodes.name: BorderProperties
nodes.summary: Default constructor initialising all border dimensions and display flags to their QET defaults (17 columns, 8 rows, standard widths and heights).

nodes.name: operator==
nodes.summary: Equality operator comparing all eight border property fields between two BorderProperties instances.

nodes.name: toXml
nodes.summary: Serialises all border dimension fields as attributes on a provided QDomElement for diagram XML persistence.

nodes.name: fromXml
nodes.summary: Reads border dimension fields from a QDomElement, guarding each attribute read with hasAttribute checks.

nodes.name: toSettings
nodes.summary: Persists all border property fields into a QSettings store under an optional prefix key.

nodes.name: fromSettings
nodes.summary: Reads border property fields from a QSettings store under an optional prefix, using qRound for real-valued dimensions.

nodes.name: defaultProperties
nodes.summary: Static factory that loads and returns a BorderProperties instance populated from application QSettings, providing the user-configured defaults.

nodes.name: borderproperties_test.cpp

nodes.name: tst_My_test.cpp

nodes.name: richtexteditor.cpp
nodes.summary: Implements a rich text editor subsystem adapted from Qt Designer, providing a tabbed dialog (rich text + HTML source views), toolbar with formatting actions (bold, italic, underline, superscript, subscript, color, hyperlink), and an HTML simplification filter. All classes live in the qdesigner_internal namespace.

nodes.name: richtexteditor_p.h
nodes.summary: Public header declaring the RichTextEditorDialog class in the qdesigner_internal namespace; exposes the dialog's interface for setText, text retrieval, font control, and the applyEditText signal used by callers to receive edited content.

nodes.name: ui_addlinkdialog.h
nodes.summary: Qt Designer-generated UI header for the 'Insert Link' dialog, setting up a form layout with title and URL QLineEdit fields and an OK/Cancel button box via the Ui_AddLinkDialog class.
nodes.languageNotes: Auto-generated by Qt UIC from addlinkdialog.ui; changes will be overwritten on recompile. Uses Qt4-era QString::fromUtf8 object naming convention.

nodes.name: RichTextEditorDialog
nodes.summary: Top-level tabbed dialog combining a RichTextEditor and a raw HTML source editor (HtmlTextEdit), with state tracking for which pane was last edited and an applyEditText signal emitted on acceptance.

nodes.name: RichTextEditor
nodes.summary: Core QTextEdit subclass with rich text / plain text switching, font and formatting helpers, a simplifyRichText mode, and a factory method for creating the associated toolbar.

nodes.name: AddLinkDialog
nodes.summary: Modal dialog for inserting a hyperlink into the RichTextEditor; reads the current text selection as the default link title and injects an HTML anchor tag on acceptance.

nodes.name: HtmlTextEdit
nodes.summary: QTextEdit subclass used for the raw HTML source view; overrides the context menu to provide a submenu of common HTML entity insertions (amp, nbsp, lt, gt, copy, reg).

nodes.name: ColorAction
nodes.summary: QAction subclass that displays a 24x24 color swatch icon and opens a QColorDialog when triggered, emitting colorChanged to update the editor's text color.

nodes.name: RichTextEditorToolBar
nodes.summary: QToolBar subclass that wires bold, italic, underline, superscript, subscript, text-color, font-size, alignment, and hyperlink-insertion actions to the RichTextEditor, updating action check-states in response to cursor movement.

nodes.name: Ui_AddLinkDialog
nodes.summary: Qt UIC-generated struct that constructs and retranslates the AddLinkDialog UI, providing titleInput and urlInput QLineEdit members and a standard OK/Cancel button box.

nodes.name: RichTextEditorDialog
nodes.summary: Declaration of RichTextEditorDialog in the qdesigner_internal namespace, exposing the dialog API (setText, text, setDefaultFont, showDialog) and the applyEditText signal.

nodes.name: simplifyRichTextFilter
nodes.summary: Streams an HTML string through QXmlStreamReader/Writer, dropping meta and style elements, stripping all paragraph attributes except align, and removing whitespace-only text nodes; also detects when the result is plain text.

nodes.name: RichTextEditorToolBar::updateActions
nodes.summary: Reads the current cursor's character format and paragraph alignment from the editor and synchronises the checked state and font-size combo selection of all toolbar actions.

nodes.name: RichTextEditorDialog::tabIndexChanged
nodes.summary: Handles tab switching between the rich text and HTML source views: converts content bidirectionally, preserves the cursor position, and resets state tracking to avoid spurious change notifications.

nodes.name: auto-doxygen.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that runs Doxygen on every tag push, uploads the generated Qt help (.qch) file as a pull request, and deploys the HTML docs to GitHub Pages.

nodes.name: doxygen
nodes.summary: Installs Doxygen and Graphviz, runs the Doxyfile to generate HTML and QCH documentation, then opens a pull request to commit the updated .qch file and uploads the HTML output as a Pages artifact.

nodes.name: deploy
nodes.summary: Deploys the uploaded Pages artifact to the github-pages environment, dependent on the doxygen job completing successfully.

nodes.name: windows-build.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that builds QElectroTech for Windows (Qt5, MSYS2/UCRT64) on push or PR to master, producing both a portable archive and an NSIS installer artifact.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses MSYS2 with UCRT64 toolchain and explicitly removes Qt6 cmake files to force a Qt5 build, reflecting the project's dual Qt5/Qt6 development state.

nodes.name: build-windows
nodes.summary: Single-job pipeline that installs MSYS2/UCRT64 dependencies, configures and builds with CMake/Ninja in Qt5 mode, runs windeployqt, copies all runtime DLLs (including recursive ldd-based collection), generates NSIS installer images if missing, patches the installer script with the version, and produces both a portable files/ archive and an NSIS .exe artifact.

nodes.name: CMakeLists.txt
nodes.summary: Root CMake build file for QElectroTech that configures the Qt6 project, links against Qt6, KF6, SQLite3, pugixml, and SingleApplication, sets up translations, and defines installation rules for the application binary, icons, elements, and language files.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses Qt6 CMake integration (qt_add_executable, qt_standard_project_setup, qt_add_translations) and pulls in KDE Frameworks and third-party libraries via FetchContent include scripts. CMAKE_AUTOUIC_SEARCH_PATHS and CMAKE_AUTORCC are enabled for Qt UI/resource auto-processing.

nodes.name: CONTRIBUTING.md
nodes.summary: Contributor guide describing commit message conventions, interactive staging with git add -i/-p, and QElectroTech code style rules including tab indentation and 80-character line limit.

nodes.name: ChangeLog.MD
nodes.summary: Auto-generated changelog covering every release from v0.1 (2008) through the current unreleased HEAD, listing closed GitHub issues and merged pull requests for each version milestone.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Primary project README providing an overview of QElectroTech as a libre CAD/CAE schematic editor, describing its features (8200+ symbol library, multi-language GUI, nomenclature, CSV export), technical choices (Qt/C++/KF/CMake/SQLite), project history since 2007, and licensing information.

nodes.name: packaging_script_AppImage.sh
nodes.summary: Shell script for building a QElectroTech x86_64 AppImage: resets sources, pulls git submodules, builds with qmake, copies assets into the appdir skeleton, runs linuxdeployqt and appimagetool, then optionally rsyncs the resulting .AppImage to the download server.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses qmake (not CMake) and the legacy linuxdeployqt-continuous tool, targeting the Qt5 build path; the aarch64 variant is the more modern counterpart.

nodes.name: packaging_script_AppImage_aarch64.sh
nodes.summary: Shell script for building a QElectroTech aarch64 (ARM64) AppImage, targeting Debian Trixie on Raspberry Pi 5: builds with qmake, assembles the AppDir manually, deploys Qt dependencies with linuxdeploy-aarch64, writes a custom AppRun wrapper, then optionally rsyncs the result to the download server.
nodes.languageNotes: Writes a custom AppRun script that sets --common-elements-dir, --common-tbt-dir, and --lang-dir so the AppImage finds its bundled data without an installer.

nodes.name: packaging_script_Debian_Ubuntu_Windows.sh
nodes.summary: Comprehensive interactive packaging script covering Debian stable and sid .deb packages (via pbuilder/pdebuild), Ubuntu PPA uploads for Bionic through Kinetic (via debuild/dput), and Windows 64-bit builds via MXE MinGW cross-compilation producing both an NSIS installer and a ready-to-use 7zip archive, with optional rsync upload to the TuxFamily download server.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses interactive yes/no prompts at each stage (clean, build, sign, upload, rsync) so the operator can skip steps. GPG signing is done with a hardcoded key fingerprint (D3439F4E...). Windows cross-compilation uses a bundled MXE qmake path.

nodes.name: packaging_script_Flatpak.sh
nodes.summary: Minimal shell script that builds the QElectroTech Flatpak using flatpak-builder with GPG signing, updates the local repository with static deltas, and rsyncs it to the download server.
nodes.languageNotes: References a GPG key placeholder (XXXX...) and the Flatpak manifest at build-aux/flatpak/org.qelectrotech.QElectroTech.json.

nodes.name: org.qelectrotech.QElectroTech.json
nodes.summary: Root Flatpak manifest for QElectroTech, targeting the KDE Platform 5.15 runtime. Declares sandbox permissions (Wayland, X11, CUPS, host filesystem), references tkinter and pypi-dependencies sub-modules, and builds the application via qmake from the repository root.
nodes.languageNotes: Flatpak manifest format; sub-modules are referenced by filename (tkinter.json, pypi-dependencies.json) and are merged at build time by flatpak-builder.

nodes.name: pypi-dependencies.json
nodes.summary: Flatpak sub-module manifest that installs two Python packages into the sandbox: PySimpleGUI (UI toolkit) and qet-tb-generator (QElectroTech titleblock generator tool), both fetched from PyPI as pre-built wheels.

nodes.name: tkinter.json
nodes.summary: Flatpak sub-module manifest that works around the missing tkinter in the Freedesktop SDK by building Tcl/Tk 8.6.17 from source via autotools and then installing the tkinter-standalone Python package, satisfying the dependency required by qet-tb-generator.
nodes.languageNotes: Builds both tcl and tk as nested sub-modules using autotools under the unix/ subdir — a common pattern for Flatpak bundling of Tcl/Tk when the runtime SDK omits it.

nodes.name: Lancer QET.bat
nodes.summary: Windows batch launcher script that sets the working directory and starts qelectrotech.exe with explicit paths for elements, titleblocks, and lang directories, plus the windowsvista visual style.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses %~dp0 to derive the script's own directory, ensuring relative paths resolve correctly regardless of where the batch file is invoked from.

nodes.name: MIGRATION_NOTES.md
nodes.summary: French-language migration guide documenting 8 specific breaking changes required when upgrading the QElectroTech Windows NSIS installer scripts from NSIS 2.x to NSIS 3.x, including encoding, registry, and API changes.

nodes.name: README.txt
nodes.summary: Minimal setup instructions for building the Windows installer, directing the user to extract the win32-readytouse.zip archive into the files/ directory and then run QET.nsi.

nodes.name: delete_me.css
nodes.summary: Standard Doxygen 1.12.0 CSS stylesheet providing full visual styling for generated HTML documentation, including typography, navigation, syntax highlighting, and responsive layout rules. The filename suggests it is a placeholder or candidate for removal once a custom stylesheet is adopted.
nodes.languageNotes: Pure CSS with vendor-prefixed transitions and a large number of selectors targeting Doxygen-generated HTML class names.

nodes.name: delete_me.html
nodes.summary: Doxygen 1.12.0 HTML footer template that renders the standard Doxygen attribution footer, conditionally using a tree-view navigation path or a plain horizontal rule depending on the GENERATE_TREEVIEW setting.

nodes.name: header.html
nodes.summary: Doxygen 1.12.0 HTML header template that sets up the page `<head>` with meta tags, stylesheets, JavaScript includes (jQuery, dynsections, doxygen-awesome dark-mode toggle and fragment copy-button), and the top title-area bar with project name, logo, number, brief, and optional search box.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses Doxygen template variable substitution syntax ($variable and $relpath^asset) which is expanded at doc-generation time, not at browser render time.

nodes.name: Info.plist
nodes.summary: macOS application bundle property list declaring the QElectroTech executable, bundle identifier (org.qelectrotech), document type associations for .qet, .elmt, and .titleblock files, Retina display support, and minimum system version (12.3.0).
nodes.languageNotes: Apple plist format; CFBundleDocumentTypes registers three file types as Editor role, enabling double-click-to-open on macOS.

nodes.name: Lancer QET.bat
nodes.summary: Windows launcher batch script that sets element collection attributes to read-only then starts QElectroTech with all required command-line directory arguments (elements, titleblocks, lang, config, data) and the freetype font engine.

nodes.name: MacQetDeploy.sh
nodes.summary: macOS (x86_64 / Intel) release deployment script that pulls the latest git source, builds QElectroTech with qmake/clang, packages it into a signed .app bundle via macdeployqt, copies elements/titleblocks/lang/fonts/licenses, creates a DMG disk image, and optionally rsyncs the DMG to the download server.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses qmake-based build (not CMake); the active qt6_cmake_joshua branch has replaced qmake with CMake, so this script targets the legacy Qt5 build pipeline.

nodes.name: MacQetDeploy_arm64.sh
nodes.summary: macOS Apple Silicon (arm64) release deployment script mirroring MacQetDeploy.sh but producing a notarized and stapled ZIP archive instead of a DMG, with additional steps for Apple codesigning (Developer ID), xcrun notarytool submission, and xcrun stapler stapling before upload.
nodes.languageNotes: Includes Apple notarization workflow via xcrun notarytool and stapler, required for Gatekeeper on Apple Silicon Macs.

nodes.name: launch_qet.sh
nodes.summary: Portable Linux/Unix launcher shell script that resolves sibling directories (elements, titleblocks, lang) relative to the script location using readlink, validates the executable, then launches QElectroTech with the appropriate --common-elements-dir, --common-tbt-dir, and --lang-dir arguments.

nodes.name: qelectrotech.appdata.xml
nodes.summary: AppStream/Freedesktop application metadata file for Linux software centers, providing multilingual application name, summary, and description in 30+ locales, release history, screenshot URLs, project license (GPL-2.0), and contact information.
nodes.languageNotes: AppStream component type 'desktop-application' is consumed by GNOME Software, KDE Discover, and similar package managers to display rich application metadata.

nodes.name: qelectrotech.xml
nodes.summary: Freedesktop shared MIME info database fragment registering three QElectroTech MIME types (application/x-qet-project for .qet, application/x-qet-element for .elmt, application/x-qet-titleblock for .titleblock) with multilingual descriptions for Linux file manager integration.
nodes.languageNotes: Installed to /usr/share/mime/packages/ to integrate with the XDG MIME database; enables file type recognition in Nautilus, Dolphin, and Thunar.

nodes.name: register_filetypes.bat
nodes.summary: Windows batch script that generates and applies a .reg file registering QElectroTech's three file type associations (.qet, .elmt, .titleblock) in the Windows Registry (HKEY_CLASSES_ROOT), including icon paths and shell open commands pointing to the launcher batch file.

nodes.name: .clang-format

nodes.name: .gitattributes

nodes.name: .gitmodules

nodes.name: .understandignore

nodes.name: fix-appdata.patch
nodes.summary: Git-format patch updating qelectrotech.appdata.xml to the modern AppStream component format, adding developer info, multiple screenshot URLs, and correcting URLs to HTTPS for Flatpak packaging compliance.

nodes.name: fix-the-installation-paths.patch

nodes.name: tkinter-build.patch

nodes.name: packaging
nodes.summary: Placeholder or stub file in the Fedora packaging auxiliary directory, containing minimal content.

nodes.summary: Multilingual description (15 languages) of the QElectroTech elements collection package for use in Fedora Linux packaging metadata.

nodes.name: README.txt
nodes.summary: Brief note pointing to the external Gentoo CVS repository where the QElectroTech ebuild is hosted.

nodes.name: qelectrotech-launch

nodes.name: snapcraft.yaml

nodes.name: lang_extra_fr.nsh

nodes.name: developer_options.cmake

nodes.name: fetch_kdeaddons.cmake
nodes.summary: CMake module that either fetches KF6 KCoreAddons and KWidgetsAddons via FetchContent (BUILD_KF6=ON) at a pinned git tag, or finds them as system packages, then exposes KF6_PRIVATE_LIBRARIES for linking.
nodes.languageNotes: ECM_SKIP_QDOC_GENERATION=ON prevents duplicate-target CMake errors on systems with ECMGenerateQDoc installed (Homebrew extra-cmake-modules).

nodes.name: fetch_pugixml.cmake
nodes.summary: CMake module that either fetches the pugixml v1.15 XML library via FetchContent (BUILD_PUGIXML=ON) or locates the system-installed package.

nodes.name: fetch_singleapplication.cmake
nodes.summary: Fetches the SingleApplication library (v3.5.4) via CMake FetchContent from GitHub, configuring it to use QApplication as the base class.

nodes.name: git_last_commit_sha.cmake
nodes.summary: Retrieves the current HEAD git commit SHA at configure time and exposes it as the GIT_COMMIT_SHA preprocessor definition in compiled C++ source.

nodes.name: git_update_submodules.cmake
nodes.summary: Runs git submodule update --init --recursive at configure time to ensure all submodules are checked out before the build proceeds.

nodes.name: paths_compilation_installation.cmake
nodes.summary: Defines platform-specific installation and compilation paths (Linux, macOS, Windows) for QET binaries, elements, titleblocks, language files, and other resources, with a special Debug mode on macOS that uses binary-relative paths for developer workflow.
nodes.languageNotes: The macOS Debug branch sets QET_COMMON_COLLECTION_PATH_RELATIVE_TO_BINARY_PATH_VAR so that cmake/define_definitions.cmake can suppress the /usr/local/ prefix, enabling running from the build directory without installation.

nodes.name: qet_compilation_vars.cmake

nodes.name: start_options.cmake

nodes.summary: Selects and returns the longest string whose pixel width fits within the given radius, using a sorted vector and upper_bound binary search over the cached size hash.
